result.stdout:
1.0.23

A simple file based job journal

Usage: fjj [options] [command]

Options:
  --version     Show version information
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  activity      start current activity
  project       set current project
  start         start your journal
  stop          stop your journal

Run 'fjj [command] --help' for more information about a command.

start current activity

Usage: fjj activity [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  Activity            your actual activity

Options:
  -m|--minus <MINUS>  Minus
  -+|--plus <PLUS>    Plus
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information
